title: christella taprobanica
intro: Christella taprobanica, also known as the Taprobanis fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Sri Lankan medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Christella taprobanica include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with arthritis. Herbal preparations of Christella taprobanica can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical applications to promote wound healing and skin health.
